title: Tissue perfusion parameter-guided initial resuscitation in adult patients with sepsis or septic shock: A systematic review and network meta-analysis
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"dmu4m","text":"Background: Hemodynamic management is crucial in treating patients with sepsis or septic shock. To date, several tissue perfusion parameters have been suggested, however; the optimal parameter is not well defined.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":11}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3mrir","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5c75u","text":"Objective: This study aims to examine whether and which tissue perfusion parameter-guided therapy during initial resuscitation in adult patients with sepsis or septic shock improved patients’ outcomes. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d72lb","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bhn8u","text":"Design: Systematic review and network meta-analysis.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"76b3i","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6oqen","text":"Data sources: We will search the following electronic bibliographic databases: Cochrane Central Register of Controlled Trials (CENTRAL) in the Cochrane Library, MEDLINE via PubMed, Web of Science, and Igaku-Chuo-Zasshi. We will also search the World Health Organization International Clinical Trials platforms Search Portal (ICTRP) and ClinicalTrials.gov. for ongoing trials. There will be no language restriction.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":13}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e09od","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3svhf","text":"Analysis: We will have two types of meta-analysis planned. First, direct pairwise meta-analysis will be conducted using random effect models. Second, network comparison meta-analysis will be conducted using a frequentist approach with multivariate random effect meta-analysis.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Tomoki Kuribara
